Dataset¶

class experiments.dataset.Dataset(data, name=None, root=None, *args, **kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: object

Dataset wrapper class.

epoch(config=None)[source]¶

Return a full epoch iterable from this dataset. :param config Target configuration for the sampled tensors:

Returns:

Full epoch iterable

Notes

Only work for dataset based on PyTorch’s DataLoader

classmethod get_default_root()[source]¶

Lazy-initialize and return the default dataset root directory path. :Returns: ‘__default_root’

sample(config=None)[source]¶

Sample the next batch from this dataset. :param config Target configuration for the sampled tensors:

Returns:

Next batch

experiments.dataset.batch_dataset(inputs, labels, train=False, batch_size=None, split=0.75)[source]¶

Batch a given raw (tensor) dataset into either a training or testing infinite sampler generators. :param inputs Tensor of positive dimension containing input data: :param labels Tensor of same shape as ‘inputs’ containing expected output data: :param train Whether this is for training: :type train Whether this is for training: basically adds shuffling :param batch_size Training batch size: :type batch_size Training batch size: or 0 :param None: :type None: or 0 :param split Fraction of datapoints to use in the train set if < 1: :param or #samples in the train set if ≥ 1:

Returns:

  • Training or testing set infinite sampler generator (with uniformly sampled batches)

  • Test set infinite sampler generator (without random sampling)

experiments.dataset.get_default_transform(dataset, train)[source]¶

Get the default transform associated with the given dataset name. :param dataset Case-sensitive dataset name: :param or None to get no transformation: :param train Whether the transformation is for the training set: :type train Whether the transformation is for the training set: always ignored if None is given for ‘dataset’

Returns:

Associated default transformations (always exist)

experiments.dataset.make_datasets(dataset, train_batch=None, test_batch=None, train_transforms=None, test_transforms=None, num_workers=1, **custom_args)[source]¶

Helper to make new instances of training and testing datasets. :param dataset Case-sensitive dataset name: :param train_batch Training batch size: :param None or 0 for maximum possible: :param test_batch Testing batch size: :param None or 0 for maximum possible: :param train_transforms Transformations to apply on the training set: :param None for default for the given dataset: :param test_transforms Transformations to apply on the testing set: :param None for default for the given dataset: :param num_workers Positive number of workers for each of the training and testing datasets: :param or tuple for each of them: :param … Additional dataset-dependent keyword-arguments:

Returns:

Training dataset, testing dataset

experiments.dataset.make_sampler(loader)[source]¶

Infinite sampler generator from a dataset loader. :param loader Dataset loader to use:

Yields:

Sample, forever (transparently iterating the given loader again and again)
